UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DI PASQUA, RINO AS TO DEFENDANT CUSSEN, KELLY A. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DI PASQUA, RINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSSEN, KELLY A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1200 3RD AVE. APT. #D, S.F. CA. $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, DEFENDANT SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES NO LATE THAN BY MID- NIGHT ON APRIL 10, 2001. WAIVES HER SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $3000,PLUS INTEREST. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IN THE PREMISES AFTER MIDNIGHT ON 4/10 CAN BE DISPOSED OF WITHOUT FURTHER NOTICE, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
